items.title: Bayelsa community laments collapse of 27-year hospital

items.title: Focal astrocyte loss reveals nuclear translocation during lesion repopulation
items.desc: Herwerth et al. demonstrate that, after focal astrocyte loss in the adult brain, perilesional astrocytes undergo extensive remodeling, proliferation and nuclear translocation to repopulate the depleted tissue without forming a glial scar.
